executives.name: Scott Melbye
executives.background: Mr. Melbye is a 40-year veteran of the nuclear energy industry having held leadership positions in major uranium mining companies. He is also the Executive Vice President of Uranium Energy Corp. and has served as President of the Uranium Producers of America.

executives.name: Josephine Man
executives.background: Ms. Man has over 20 years of experience in finance and accounting. She has served as the Chief Financial Officer of several publicly traded companies in the mining and technology sectors.

board_of_directors.name: Amir Adnani
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Adnani is the founder and Chairman of Uranium Royalty Corp. He is also the President, CEO, and a director of Uranium Energy Corp. and the Chairman of GoldMining Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Scott Melbye
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Melbye is a 40-year veteran of the nuclear energy industry having held leadership positions in major uranium mining companies. He is also the Executive Vice President of Uranium Energy Corp.

board_of_directors.name: Vina Kim
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Kim is a lawyer with over 15 years of experience in corporate and securities law. She has served as legal counsel for several mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Neil Gregson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Gregson has over 30 years of experience in the investment management industry, specializing in the mining and energy sectors. He was previously a portfolio manager at J.P. Morgan Asset Management.

board_of_directors.name: John Knowles
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Knowles is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 30 years of experience in senior financial roles in the mining industry. He has served as CFO for several mining companies.

sources.source_description: Form 40-F Annual Report for the fiscal year ended April 30, 2024
